metadata.changes:
Change 1: Replace:
  if p == "bird":
              return f"The {obj.lower()} is a bird found in {subj}"
          # Generic fallback
          return f"is {obj}"
with:
  if p == "bird":
              return f"The {obj.lower()} is a bird found in {subj}"
          # New handling for geographic part relationships
          if p == "part":
              # Expect format "X County, State" or similar
              parts = [x.strip() for x in obj.split(',')]
              if len(parts) == 2:
                  typ = parts[0]
                  loc = parts[1]
                  return f"is a {typ.lower()} in {loc}"
              else:
                  return f"is part of {obj}"
          if p == "partstype":
              # This predicate provides type information that is usually redundant with 'part'
              # Skip generating a separate clause
              return ""
          # Generic fallback
          return f"is {obj}"
